flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at LIM College rose 15% between 2006 and 2009 ($17.7k → $20.4k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at LIM College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($29.5k → $33.5k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at LIM College fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (58.0% → 50.9%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at LIM College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.2% → 0.0%).
